Off Calendar Jan-22-2019 Granted Per Written Order

PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION, APPOINTMENT UNDER IAEA
Off Calendar Sep-18-2018 Continued To Jan-22-19 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Lauren Peebles for Gwendolyn Belle (Petitioner).
Randall Boessenecker for Charles Belle (Objector).

Ms. Peebles stated that they have agreed to participate in mediation, that they have not discussed dates, that Mr. Belle has served discovery and that she wants to serve some discovery as well. The Court signed the order referring the matter to Pro Bono Mediation. Mediation must be completed no later than January 11, 2019. The Parties are to notify the Probate Examiner as to the outcome of mediation by January 16, 2019. The Amended Petition for Probate is continued to and the Parties are to return on January 22, 2019 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204 for status of mediation. The Court expects the parties to have met and conferred as to how the case will proceed and to have filed a joint status conference statement.

Judge: Peter J. Busch. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: R. Rosado. Not reported.

PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION, APPOINTMENT UNDER IAEA
Off Calendar Mar-06-2018 Continued To May-01-18 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Lauren N. Peebles for Gwendolyn Belle (Petitioner)

Ms. Peebles requested a 4 week continuance, stating a Will has been discovered and she will file an amended petition for Letters Testamentary. The Petition for Letters of Administration is continued to May 1, 2018 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Peter J. Busch. Clerk: Craig Blackstone/Shirley Le. Bailiff: Deputy V. Jung. (Not reported)
